data.host: Victron venus host name or IP
data.simple_naming: Simple naming (no installation id in entity ids)

data_description.elevated_tracing: For debugging purpose only: If substring is in topic those topics will have full traces
data_description.excluded_devices: List of devices to exclude from being monitored.
data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of Victron Device, usually mDNS name like 'venus.local'
data_description.operation_mode: Operation mode controls which Home Assistant entity types are created. 'read_only' exposes only sensors and binary_sensors (no writable entities), 'full' exposes all entity types (sensors, binary_sensors, numbers, selects, switches), 'experimental' is reserved for future use (behaves like 'full' today).
data_description.password: Password for the Victron Device, default is empty. This is not your VRM password.
data_description.port: The MQTT port on the host. Normally it is 1883.
data_description.root_topic_prefix: Root topic prefix if used via MQTT gateway.
data_description.simple_naming: Use simple naming for entities, can work only when you have single Cerbo on the network.
data_description.ssl: Indicates whether to use SSL to connect to the Victron Device. Normally it is disabled.
data_description.update_frequency: Update frequency in seconds. Default is 30 seconds. Set to 0 to update always.
data_description.username: Username for the MQTT server, default is empty. Not needed by Victron devices. This is only needed if you use route your mqtt messages through non Victron server and it does require username.

generator_gen_id_start_on_temp_enabled.name: Generator start on high temp enabled

system_ess_battery_use.name: ESS only critical loads from battery

state.recharge: Recharge, SOC dropped 5% or more below MinSOC
state.recharge_no_battery_life: Recharge, SOC dropped 5% or more below MinSOC (No BatteryLife)
state.self_consumption_soc_above_min: Self consumption, SoC at or above minimum SoC
state.self_consumption_soc_below_min: Self consumption, SoC is below minimum SoC
state.soc_below_battery_life_dynamic_soc_limit: SoC below BatteryLife dynamic SoC limit
state.soc_below_soc_limit_24_hours: SoC has been below SoC limit for more than 24 hours. Charging with battery with 5amps

state.phase_compensation_disabled: Optimized mode or 'keep batteries charged' and phase compensation disabled
state.phase_compensation_enabled: Optimized mode or 'keep batteries charged' and phase compensation enabled

battery_nr_modules_blocking_charge.name: Battery number of modules blocking charge

battery_nr_modules_blocking_discharge.name: Battery number of modules blocking discharge

state.engine_shutdown: Engine shutdown on low input voltage

solarcharger_max_battery_voltage_today.name: Solar charger max battery voltage today

solarcharger_min_battery_voltage_today.name: Solar charger min battery voltage today

solarcharger_time_in_absorption_today.name: Solar charger time in absorption today

solarcharger_time_in_bulk_today.name: Solar charger time in bulk today

solarcharger_time_in_float_today.name: Solar charger time in float today

state.battery_to_grid_restricted: Battery to grid energy flow restricted
state.grid_to_battery_restricted: Grid to battery energy flow restricted
state.no_flow: No energy flow between battery and grid
state.no_restrictions: No Restrictions between battery and the grid

state.recharge: Recharge, SOC dropped 5% or more below MinSOC
state.recharge_no_battery_life: Recharge, SOC dropped 5% or more below MinSOC (No BatteryLife)
state.self_consumption_soc_above_min: Self consumption, SoC at or above minimum SoC
state.self_consumption_soc_below_min: Self consumption, SoC is below minimum SoC
state.soc_below_battery_life_dynamic_soc_limit: SoC below BatteryLife dynamic SoC limit
state.soc_below_soc_limit_24_hours: SoC has been below SoC limit for more than 24 hours. Charging with battery with 5amps

state.phase_compensation_disabled: Optimized mode or 'keep batteries charged' and phase compensation disabled
state.phase_compensation_enabled: Optimized mode or 'keep batteries charged' and phase compensation enabled

generator_gen_id_start_on_temp_enabled.name: Generator start on high temp enabled

system_ess_battery_use.name: ESS only critical loads from battery
